conversation.text: so what's your lead source at the moment? is it more ads or referrals?
Bit of both. But I want to know the price first. What's the damage?

hard to give a number here as it's scope-based, depends what needs building. but usually it comes in under a month of your ad spend|||we split it 50/50 too, so it's not all upfront. Louis can give you an exact figure once he sees your setup
That doesn't tell me much though.

look, roughly it's a few grand for the build, but honestly it depends if we're building for one channel or five|||it's easier to just grab 20 mins with Louis. he'll give you a proper figure straight away and you can decide if it makes sense. want the link?
